storyboard.content: I have severe pain in my upper abdomen that comes in waves. It's been really intense and I can't get comfortable.
I've been nauseated and vomiting along with the abdominal pain. It makes eating feel impossible.
My skin looks yellowish and I noticed it recently. My eyes might be a little yellow too.
My urine has been much darker than normal — it's almost tea-colored. That started around the same time as everything else.
The pain shoots into my back and it gets much worse right after I eat anything. I've basically stopped eating because of it.
This has been going on for about 5 days and each day feels worse than the last. It hasn't let up at all.
The pain is an 8 out of 10. I can't work, I can barely sleep, and I can hardly eat anything at all.
I'm a 42-year-old woman. I don't have any diagnosed digestive conditions that I know of.
